## Purpose

Describe the implementation objective and the approved requirement or milestone this change supports.

## Scope

List the applications, packages, or documentation areas changed.

## Traceability

- Product / architecture document:
- Requirement or milestone:
- ADR, if applicable:

## Validation

- [ ] TypeScript passes
- [ ] ESLint passes
- [ ] Formatting passes
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Build passes

## Accessibility

Describe accessibility impact, keyboard behavior, focus behavior, and any validation performed.

## Security

Describe authentication, authorization, RBAC, data access, or configuration impact.

## Documentation

- [ ] Storybook updated, if applicable
- [ ] Public API documentation updated, if applicable
- [ ] Engineering documentation updated, if applicable

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## Breaking Changes

Describe breaking changes and migration notes, or write `None`.
